mapper.insert: insert into pay_record(order_id, pay_time, pay_status) values (#{orderId}, #{payTime}, #{payStatus})
mapper.update:
UPDATE appoint_order o JOIN pay_record r ON o.order_id = r.order_id SET o.pay_status = 1, o.order_status = 1, o.pay_time = r.pay_time WHERE
(o.pay_status = 0 or o.pay_time is null)
AND r.pay_status = 1
AND r.pay_time >= #{payTime}
mapper.select: select patient_id, schedule_id from appoint_order where order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id as id, o.confirm_time, o.cancel_role, o.cancel_reason, o.patient_id, o.doctor_id, o.depart_id, o.schedule_id, o.order_status as status, o.create_time, o.time_slot, o.schedule_date AS appointment_date, u.real_name AS patient_name, u.phone AS patient_phone, dep.name AS department_name FROM appoint_order o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.patient_id = u.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON o.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN depart dep ON o.depart_id = dep.id
o.doctor_id = #{id} and o.pay_status in (1,2)
AND o.order_status = #{status}
AND o.order_status in (1,2,3,4) -- 默认查询
AND o.schedule_data = #{time}
AND ( u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
